title: Stock Market Prediction App
description: AI-powered financial forecasting using LSTM neural networks and NLP sentiment analysis. Real-time data feeds, interactive candlestick charts, and portfolio risk scoring.

title: Neural Visualizer
description: Interactive 3D visualization of neural network architectures with live training metrics and layer-by-layer activation heatmaps rendered in WebGL.

title: DevCollab
description: Real-time collaborative code editor with video chat, shared terminals, and AI pair-programming assistant powered by the Claude API.

title: CryptoScan
description: Blockchain explorer and DeFi analytics dashboard. Tracks wallet activity, smart contract events, and on-chain market trends in real time.

title: AIscript
description: VS Code extension using Claude API for context-aware code generation, explanation, and automated refactoring across 20+ languages.

title: FluxDB
description: A blazing-fast distributed time-series database written in Rust, optimised for high-frequency financial data ingestion. Handles 1M+ writes/sec with sub-millisecond query latency using Raft consensus and columnar storage.
